title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 86.097 - Return of accumulated contributions
text:
86.097.  Return of accumulated contributions. — Should a member cease to be a policeman except by death or retirement, he shall be paid on demand the amount of his accumulated contributions standing to the credit of his individual account in the annuity savings fund.
(RSMo 1939 § 9469) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 8911
